meta.name: A. A. M. Ashfatul Islam
meta.about: Frontend Developer with 3 years of professional experience building commercial SaaS applications using React, JavaScript, SCSS, and modern frontend technologies. Served as the sole frontend developer for nearly two years, owning frontend development across 17+ commercial products ranging from enterprise LMS platforms and e-commerce systems to accounting and business management software. Experienced in translating 200+ Figma designs into responsive, production-ready interfaces, integrating REST APIs, optimizing application performance, and collaborating with designers, backend engineers, project managers, and executive stakeholders. Currently expanding full-stack expertise with Next.js, Node.js, Express.js, and MongoDB through personal projects.

achievements.title: Frontend Ownership
achievements.description: Served as the sole frontend developer for nearly two years, managing frontend development across approximately 17 commercial products.

achievements.title: Product Development
achievements.description: Built 6+ frontend applications from scratch and contributed to the ongoing development of 10+ existing enterprise products.

achievements.title: UI Engineering
achievements.description: Translated more than 200 Figma designs into responsive, production-ready user interfaces using React, JavaScript, SCSS, and Laravel Blade.

achievements.title: Cross-functional Collaboration
achievements.description: Worked closely with designers, backend engineers, project managers, and company leadership to deliver commercial SaaS applications.

impact: Served as the sole frontend developer for nearly two years, leading frontend implementation, UI maintenance, and feature delivery across approximately 17 commercial products.

Built 6+ frontend applications from scratch and contributed to the continuous development and maintenance of 10+ existing SaaS products across education, e-commerce, accounting, legal, booking, and business management domains.
Converted more than 200 Figma designs into responsive, production-ready React and Laravel Blade interfaces with strong attention to design consistency, usability, and cross-browser compatibility.

Developed the complete student-facing frontend for the LevelUp LMS platform, delivering approximately 50 dynamic React screens with REST API integration, multilingual support, RTL layouts, reusable page builder components, and complex user workflows.
leadership: Served as the sole frontend developer for nearly two years, independently managing frontend development, UI maintenance, feature implementation, and frontend quality across approximately 17 commercial products.

Collaborated closely with designers, backend engineers, project managers, project leads, and company leadership to transform business requirements and Figma designs into production-ready user interfaces.
Balanced development across legacy Laravel applications and modern React projects, ensuring a consistent user experience while supporting multiple concurrent product releases.
Partnered with backend developers during API planning and implementation by defining frontend requirements, validating integrations, and resolving technical challenges throughout development.

projects.name: InfixLMS
projects.description: Enhanced and maintained a commercial LMS by implementing new user interface designs, modernizing existing frontend modules, resolving UI and responsive issues, and collaborating closely with backend developers to deliver new features and improve overall user experience.

projects.name: InfixEdu
projects.description: Improved and maintained the frontend of a large school management platform by implementing new interface designs, redesigning existing pages, fixing UI inconsistencies, enhancing responsive behavior, and supporting backend developers with production-ready frontend templates.

projects.name: LevelUp
projects.description: Built the complete student-facing frontend from scratch for a next-generation LMS, developing approximately 50 responsive React screens including authentication, course management, quizzes, instructor profiles, multilingual support, RTL layouts, dynamic page builder components, checkout, coupon workflows, blog, certificate verification, and user dashboards while integrating REST APIs and collaborating closely with backend engineers.

projects.name: Amazcart
projects.description: Maintained and enhanced the frontend of a commercial e-commerce platform by implementing new interface designs, resolving responsive and UI issues, improving existing user experiences, and collaborating with backend developers to deliver frontend enhancements across customer-facing modules.

projects.name: Aorabooks
projects.description: Enhanced an existing accounting SaaS platform by implementing new user interface designs, improving dashboard experiences, redesigning POS-related modules, developing a custom organizational chart interface, and supporting ongoing frontend improvements across the application.

projects.name: Lawcham
projects.description: Developed the complete frontend interface from scratch based on Figma designs, creating responsive layouts and reusable React components for seamless backend integration across legal management workflows.

projects.name: HelpDesk
projects.description: Maintained and enhanced an existing helpdesk platform by implementing dark mode, improving RTL support, resolving frontend issues, refining responsive layouts, and delivering UI enhancements across multiple application modules.

projects.name: VCard
projects.description: Developed the complete frontend from Figma designs and later redesigned key application interfaces, including landing pages, digital card layouts, and reusable UI components to improve the overall user experience.

projects.name: BeBooking
projects.description: Converted Figma designs into responsive React interfaces for an appointment booking platform, delivering reusable frontend components that were integrated with backend functionality by the development team.

projects.name: Edulia
projects.description: Developed responsive frontend pages and reusable UI sections from Figma designs for an education-focused website theme, ensuring consistency across desktop, tablet, and mobile devices.

projects.name: Aorasoft
projects.description: Converted Figma designs into responsive, cross-browser compatible frontend pages for the company's corporate website while maintaining visual consistency and modern web standards.

responsibilities: Served as the sole frontend developer for nearly two years, managing frontend development, UI maintenance, feature implementation, and design consistency across approximately 17 commercial products.
Built reusable React components and frontend modules for commercial SaaS applications, improving development consistency, scalability, and long-term maintainability.
Translated 200+ Figma designs into responsive, pixel-perfect user interfaces using React, JavaScript, SCSS, Bootstrap, Tailwind CSS, HTML5, and CSS3.
Integrated 30+ REST API endpoints using React Query, Context API, Axios, and React Hook Form to deliver dynamic, data-driven user experiences.
Implemented responsive layouts, multilingual interfaces, RTL support, semantic HTML, and cross-browser compatibility across desktop, tablet, and mobile devices.
Optimized frontend performance through lazy loading, code splitting, memoization, dynamic imports, image optimization, skeleton loading, debouncing, throttling, and efficient rendering techniques.
Maintained and enhanced both modern React applications and legacy Laravel Blade projects by implementing new designs, resolving UI issues, and improving overall user experience.
Collaborated daily with designers, backend engineers, project managers, project leads, and company leadership to translate business requirements into production-ready frontend solutions.
Analyzed frontend requirements, coordinated API contracts with backend developers, and independently implemented frontend integrations for dynamic application features.
Used Git with feature branches, pull requests, code reviews, and collaborative development workflows to ensure reliable code integration and project stability.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science

certificates.title: Reactive Accelerator - Batch 4
certificates.info: Completed an advanced React development program with 93.56% overall performance, covering modern React architecture, hooks, routing, state management, API integration, and production-ready application development.
